task_completion.description: Change the Site Tagline to 'Live Election Coverage 2026'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Live Election Coverage 2026' in the 'Tagline' input field under Settings > General, or visible in the site header on the frontend.
Look for the category name 'Breaking News' in the Posts > Categories list or in the category edit screen.
Look for the slug 'breaking-news' associated with the 'Breaking News' category in the Posts > Categories list or the category edit screen.

task_completion.description: Publish the draft post 'City Hall Election 2026: Live Results'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the post 'City Hall Election 2026: Live Results' with a 'Published' status in the All Posts list, or the 'Publish' button clicked and changed to 'Update' in the post editor.

task_completion.description: Make the post a sticky post
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Stick to the top of the blog' checkbox checked in the post editor's summary panel, or a 'Sticky' label next to the post title in the All Posts list.

task_completion.description: Add the post to the 'Primary Menu'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'City Hall Election 2026: Live Results' added as a menu item within the menu structure under Appearance > Menus, specifically in the Primary Menu.

task_completion.description: Add the CSS class 'breaking-pulse' to the menu item
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'breaking-pulse' entered into the 'CSS Classes (optional)' input field for the expanded 'City Hall Election 2026: Live Results' menu item under Appearance > Menus.

integrity.description: Agent used the WordPress admin GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (Settings, Posts, Appearance) in a web browser, rather than executing terminal commands or WP-CLI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual web application
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard WordPress UI elements, browser tabs, and success notifications (e.g., 'Settings saved', 'Post published', 'Menu updated') rather than a text editor or database client.

integrity.description: Changes were actually saved, not just visually altered via browser dev tools
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of saving actions (clicking 'Save Changes', 'Update', 'Publish', 'Save Menu') and subsequent page reloads or success banners confirming the changes were persisted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected site tagline is 'Live Election Coverage 2026'. The target category must be named 'Breaking News' with the slug 'breaking-news'. The target post is 'City Hall Election 2026: Live Results'. The CSS class to be added to the menu item is 'breaking-pulse'.
